# beginMonitoring()

**Instance Method**

Informs the system to start monitoring the download.

## Declaration

```swift
@objc(beginMonitoring:) func beginMonitoring() async throws -> BEDownloadMonitor.Location?
```

## Return Value

If you called [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BEDownloadMonitor-9bwls/useDownloadsFolder(placeholderType:finalFileCreatedHandler:)], this method returns the placeholder location that the system creates to host the downloaded content; otherwise, it returns `nil`.

## Reporting progress to the system

- **resumeMonitoring(placeholderURL:)**: Informs the system that it needs to resume monitoring the download.
